infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: CMG Telematics uses your location to show your position relative to fleet vehicles.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: CMG Telematics uses your location in the background to geotag task photos and track work sessions.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: CMG Telematics uses the camera to capture geotagged photos during task execution.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: CMG Telematics saves task photos to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: CMG Telematics may use the microphone to record video notes during task execution.
